[A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Let's eat it right]

[Is a 4-year veteran mukbang YouTuber...]
Hello everyone

So I'm going to be using their service for today's mukbang

Makes me want to keep using the service
If you see here,
They have a lot of partnerships
There are 3 basic benefits to this
They will provide free shipping for '11Street Amazon' shipped from outside of the country with 2 of the 5,000 Won coupons
And the 2nd benefit is that you can receive 3,000 points monthly (used as currency) from 11Street and also another 5,000 Won coupon if you make a purchase over 50,000 Won
3rd is that you get 100GB of Google One storage
I use this very often
It's just 9,900 Won per month for this service and you get so many benefits from it
[Lots of stores and restaurants]
All the ones that we use on a daily basis
You can pick 1 from these monthly to get their benefits
There's this thing that I bought with the coupon from Amazon a couple of days ago for free shipping
[A couple of days ago...]

This is nice...

I'm going to order my trays now
11Street Amazon
